title: stigmatopteris clypeata
intro: Stigmatopteris clypeata, also known as the shield-fern or shield-leaf fern, is a type of tropical fern that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Stigmatopteris clypeata include its potential to treat various ailments such as fever, diarrhea, and skin infections, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. The plant is typically prepared as an infusion or decoction, and in some cases, it is also used in herbal teas and supplements to harness its medicinal properties.
